# pexip_infinity_licence_request (Resource)

Manages a licence request. Licence requests are used to generate license activation files that can be submitted to Pexip for license provisioning. Note: This resource only supports creation and reading - licence requests cannot be updated or deleted once created.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_licence_request" "example" {
  reference = "LIC-REF-001"
  actions   = "activate"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actions` (String) The actions XML for the licence request defining what licenses are being requested.
- `reference` (String) A reference identifier for this licence request. Maximum length: 100 characters.

### Read-Only

- `generation_time` (String) The timestamp when this licence request was generated.
- `id` (String) Resource URI for the licence request
- `response_xml` (String) The response XML from the license server, if available.
- `sequence_number` (String) The sequence number generated for this licence request
- `status` (String) The current status of the licence request.
